mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS creator_id, u.nickname, u.avatar, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM consult_order co WHERE co.creator_id = u.id AND co.status = 'COMPLETED' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM refund_apply ra WHERE ra.order_id = co.id ) ), 0) AS consult_count, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM audio_info ai WHERE ai.creator_id = u.id AND ai.audit_status = 1 AND ai.is_deleted = 0 ), 0) AS audio_count, COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_follow uf2 WHERE uf2.creator_id = u.id ), 0) AS fans_count, COALESCE(( SELECT MIN(cs.price) FROM consult_slot cs WHERE cs.creator_id = u.id AND cs.status = 'AVAILABLE' ), 0) AS min_price, TRUE AS is_following FROM user_follow uf LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON uf.creator_id = u.id WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} AND u.is_creator = 1 ORDER BY uf.create_time DESC
